style_effects: Subtle heat haze shimmers around Magmar's metallic joints, reflecting distorted cityscapes in its polished armor. Glowing blue energy pulses rhythmically through its armor seams, casting cold electric-blue light that casts sharp, geometric shadows. Metallic dust particles drift upward in slow motion, catching the light like tiny shards of ice. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
